programmes.show_description: The Gold Timers negotiate a lucrative deal to sell their mining rights. Torrential summer storms in Victoria threaten to shut down the Poseidon Crew's operation. S7, Ep18
Hell or High Water. A pair of complete strangers find themselves stranded in and quite literally exposed to one of the world's most extreme weather environments. S2, Ep3
Redemption Road. AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. S2, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Free Will House. The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia. They salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets. S6, Ep6
Rural Retreat Historical Society. Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society. While Robert salvages a vault door, Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop. S6, Ep7
Fight And Flight. Shawn tries to convince potential investors on his Megadredge vision. Kris frays Andy's nerves and Zeke releases a secret weapon, but faces a sudden challenge. S6, Ep17
Last Man Diving. To fund the Megadredge, Shawn races to the Bluff with only a day left in the season. Kris hits the best gold of his life, but his shoddy gear lets him down. S6, Ep18
The Poseidon Crew receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a quartz reef. Shane and Russell strike gold. S5, Ep5
Rio Apaporis Caiman. Forrest travels to rural Columbia trekking into the lawless bush in search of a unique crocodilian species, the Rio Apaporis caiman. S2, Ep4
The Aftermath. A treacherous arctic hurricane decimates the crab grounds, forcing captains Elliot Neese and Scott Campbell Jr to face some of their toughest decisions yet. S8, Ep8
Dead Men Get No Gold. Ben's season may be saved with a kill, but gold proves elusive. John finds a promising dig site but his stamina is fading. Boyce must move 500lbs of gear. S1, Ep5
The Search For Florida's Lost Pirate. Josh heads to Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of pirate Jose Gaspar. He joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters in the search. S6, Ep2
Chasing The Snake Kings. After a potential new breakthrough, Josh returns to Guatemala, searching for a snake king tomb. Using new technology, he hopes to find the tomb's location. S6, Ep3
Tropic Thunder. The Raneys rescue a family descended from rock'n'roll royalty by reclaiming their homestead from the jungle on Kauai. But a dangerous flash flood causes issues. S4, Ep6
Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit. S7, Ep2
Ratter Brained. After ratter thieves raid their mine, the Misfits, Angel and rookie miner, Cody, struggle to find an opal king stone to fulfil an order for a buyer. S7, Ep3
First Blood. Jake becomes suspicious of Captain Keith's true intentions when he offers to take him on as an apprentice. Plus, Sig plots his revenge against his newest rival, Jake. S14, Ep2
Dead In The Water. Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab, will he betray it? Plus, will Wild Bill's risky new bait and fishing strategy pay off big? S14, Ep3
Ghosts In The Canal. Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover? S2, Ep13
Lost City Of El Mirador. Josh concludes his investigation into the mysterious Maya city of El Mirador, including the possible burial of the Snake Kings. S4, Ep13
In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season. Meanwhile, the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency. S7, Ep19
Garden of Evil. A vet and a military mum tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's Cayo Venado. Will a week of freezing rain lead the survivalists right up to breaking point? S2, Ep5
Lord of the Rats. A workaholic and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, will they be able to come together as a team? S2, Ep6
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Grace Family Church. The team travel to Virginia to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. But they run into challenges when equipment is delayed. S6, Ep8
Marion Bowling Alley. The team travel to Virginia to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. But, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated. S6, Ep9
Enter A Titan. Shawn needs a strong start to build his mega-dredge but newcomer Ken and the 600-ton Myrtle Irene may have beat him to it. Emily's plan to dive deep is in jeopardy. S7, Ep1
Crash Course. To fund the mega-dredge, Shawn races to the Bluff where Kris is onto some of the best gold. Emily's most promising summer might suddenly be dashed on the rocks. S7, Ep2
A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help. S5, Ep6
The Galapagos Giant. On one of his most audacious and exciting expeditions to date, Forrest travels to the remote Galapagos Islands in search of the fabled Fernandina tortoise. S2, Ep5
Nowhere to Go But Down. Tempers flare on the Northwestern and the future looks uncertain for the Seabrooke as the fleet prepares to begin their winter hunt for Opilio crab. S8, Ep9
Rise and Fall. As unrelenting winds rip across the crab grounds, the Wizard prepares to do battle with the descending polar ice pack. Meanwhile, tempers flare on board the Kodiak. S8, Ep10
Devil's Handshake. It's the final push before winter hits and season goals slip away. Pump problems for Boyce put his gold haul at risk, and Ben banks on his skills to survive. S1, Ep6
Gold Rush Of The Atlantic. Josh has a fresh lead on a shipwreck from 1715 with a potentially massive treasure haul. He launches an expedition into Florida's Atlantic coast. S6, Ep4
Hunt For The Chupacabra. Josh Gates embarks on yet another mission, this time into the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico in search of the mysterious Chupacabra. S6, Ep5
Home Is Where The Yurt Is. In the Tennessee mountains, the Raneys construct a massive yurt. They turn a rundown pond into a food source and create a workshop with a propane forge. S4, Ep8
Cloudy With A Chance Of Explosives. Slim Pickings' efforts to recycle precious dam water are derailed. The Blacklighters scrounge for any last opal in their Land of Promise Claim. S7, Ep4
Dig And Digger. Sam smashes opal with a jackhammer in the Bushmen's mine. Plus, Rod and Les make a wager that will force the loser to wear one of Sam's pink shirts. S7, Ep5
Salt Wounds. Sig heads off the grid on a daring midnight mission, hoping to shake his rivals. Plus, Keith receives big news from his doctor regarding a mystery illness. S14, Ep4
Collision Void. Keith struggles to keep the Wizard afloat as a flooding collision void threatens to sink him. Plus, Jake is left stranded when a boat part goes missing. S14, Ep5
An officer is spat on as he tries to arrest an angry fugitive, and a rookie cop hits the jackpot in a raid of a suspected criminal's home. S5, Ep3
Nothing Personal. Rob tries to trace the source of a dangerous new batch of drugs that's been causing a spate of overdoses in Medway. Dan chases down an aggressive drunk driver. S1, Ep2
